info.name: Microsoft Azure Guest Diagnostic Settings Association API
info.description: API to Add/Remove/List Guest Diagnostics Settings Association for Azure Resources

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Resourceuri Providers Microsoft Insights Guestdiagnosticsettingsassociation Associationname

variable.description: (Required) The fully qualified ID of the resource, including the resource name and resource type.
(Required) The name of the diagnostic settings association.

request.description: Creates or updates guest diagnostics settings association.

response.name: An existing guest diagnostic settings association was successfully updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: A new guest diagnostic settings association was successfully created.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the guest diagnostic settings association could not be created or updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Resourceuri Providers Microsoft Insights Guestdiagnosticsettingsassociation Associationname

variable.description: (Required) The fully qualified ID of the resource, including the resource name and resource type.
(Required) The name of the diagnostic settings association.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the diagnostic settings association could not be retrieved.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Resourceuri Providers Microsoft Insights Guestdiagnosticsettingsassociation Associationname

variable.description: (Required) The fully qualified ID of the resource, including the resource name and resource type.
(Required) The name of the diagnostic settings association.

response.name: The diagnostic settings association was successfully deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The diagnostic settings association does not exist. It may have already been deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the diagnostic settings association could not be deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Resourceuri Providers Microsoft Insights Guestdiagnosticsettingsassociation Associationname

variable.description: (Required) The fully qualified ID of the resource, including the resource name and resource type.
(Required) The name of the diagnostic settings association.

request.description: Updates an existing guestDiagnosticsSettingsAssociation Resource. To update other fields use the CreateOrUpdate method

response.name: An existing guest diagnostics setting resource was successfully updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Insights Guestdiagnosticsettingsassociations

request.description: Get a list of all guest diagnostic settings association in a subscription.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the list of guest diagnostic settings association could not be retrieved.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Guestdiagnosticsettingsassociations

request.description: Get a list of all guest diagnostic settings association in a resource group.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the list of guest diagnostic settings association could not be retrieved.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
